abilities.name: 자연회복
abilities.description: 배틀에서 일단 물러나면 상태 이상이 회복된다.

flavorTexts.text: This Pokémon normally is slow to react, but once it enters battle, it will strike down its enemies with lightning-fast movements.
Pawmot’s fluffy fur acts as a battery. It can store the same amount of electricity as an electric car.
